title: Flaming Portals
description: Forgot flint and steel? Use lit arrows instead!
body: Introducing the "FlamingPortals" plugin! Did you forget your flint and steel? Worry not! With this incredible plugin, your arrows become the catalyst for interdimensional travel. When an arrow hits an obsidian block, the FlamingPortals plugin works its magic, summoning a burst of flames that swiftly transforms into a fully functional Nether portal. Say goodbye to the need for flint and steel and embrace the convenience of fiery gateways to new realms and thrilling adventures.
